post.summary: Insert the Sendspark custom action into a HubSpot workflow.
post.description: Appends the published Sendspark custom action as the last action of the given HubSpot workflow (flow) for the portal connected to the workspace. Idempotent: re-inserting into a workflow that already has the action is a safe no-op (alreadyPresent: true). No AI ranking; smart placement is out of scope.

delete.summary: Remove the Sendspark custom action from a HubSpot workflow.
delete.description: Removes the published Sendspark custom action from the given HubSpot workflow (flow) for the portal connected to the workspace, re-wiring the surrounding connections so the flow stays valid. Idempotent: removing when the action is absent is a safe no-op (alreadyAbsent: true). Linear flows only; branch-aware removal is out of scope.

patch.summary: Add minutes to an existing custom DVM bundle
patch.description: Increases the minute quantity of an active custom DVM bundle by addMinutes. The new total is validated against plan max/step. Stripe prorates the additional cost for the remaining billing period and invoices it immediately.

success.description: Request success indicator. Available values: true or false

groupId.description: The created user's group ID; can be null

sessionToken.description: A temporary API token for the created user; it only returns a value if temporary tokens are enabled in the partner account settings

sessionTokenValidUntil.description: The API token expiration period (unix timestamp) for the created user; it only returns a value if temporary tokens are enabled in the partner account settings

permanentToken.description: A permanent API token for the created user; it only returns a value if permanent tokens are enabled in the partner account settings

planId.description: The created user's plan ID; it only returns a value if there are user billing plans set by the partner

trxLimit.description: The created user's transaction limit; it only returns a value if there are user billing plans set by the partner

externalPlanId.description: The created user's external plan ID; can be null

transactions.description: Number of transactions made by the user

transactionsLimit.description: Transaction limit according to the tariff, taking into account the existing transaction packages

availableTransactions.description: The number of available (unspent) transactions in the current period

trxLimited.description: Sign that transactions of the current period have ended

planTransactionsLimit.description: Transaction limit according to the tariff without taking into account the existing transaction packages

success.description: Request success indicator. Available values: true or false

enum: Booked a demo but didn't show
Engaged with a relevant LinkedIn post

videoScript.example:
Hey [name], 

Sup? I'm from Around. We're a video meeting tool for businesses. I wanted to introduce you to Sendspark, the coolest startup around. It's a must-see. Let me know when you wanna check it out. 

Thanks, have a great day!

subjectScript.example: (Video): Try Around, the Best Tool for Teams!

contentScript.example:
Hey Sendspark! 
We wanted to reach out to you and tell you more about Around. It's a user-friendly video meeting tool that makes collaboration and communication with teams easier than ever. Check out our [video] to learn more about what we can do for you. We look forward to hearing from you soon!

force.description: Force trial expiration, skipping all validations

users.description: New seat quantity (number of users) in the invites preview

total.description: Total amount to be charged for this period (formatted currency string, e.g. "$45.00")

currency.description: ISO currency code for all monetary values

endsAt.description: End of the previewed billing period as MM.DD.YY or null when unavailable

usersPrice.description: Total price attributed to users/seats for this period, or null when unavailable
